races.race_name: Hollywoodbets SCOTTSVILLE WELCOMES YOU MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: PUTTHELIGHTSOUT was a beaten favourite on the poly in his last run. He looks a better horse on turf and can make amends from a decent draw. ANATOLY caught the eye last time. He should have no problem with the extra distance. TRIP TO VENUS made progress from the back of the field in a competitive race. He should keep progressing. AFTER THE FIRE takes on males but made some improvement in blinkers last time. Well-bred PEACE SIGN makes his debut. Stable jockey rides and he is one to watch in the betting.

races.race_name: RACE COAST - BRIGHT FUTURE FOR SA HORSE RACING MAIDEN JUVENILE PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: CHRISTMAS ROSE was touched off second time out. She has improved and should go close. She is the pick of the stable trio. BLENHEIM PALACE is making steady improvement and has found market support in the past. This trip should suit. SOHO CELEBRITY gives the impression she could do with the longer trip. SO INDI tried frontrunning but tired out of it last time. She can do better with a change of tactics. AMERICA FIRST took on older runners in an Open Maiden last start. She can show more.

races.race_name: ONLINE FORM GUIDE www.gallop.co.za MAIDEN PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: Some well-bred first-timers in the line-up so keep an eye on the betting. LENOXX was only just beaten in his penultimate start after showing good speed. He should enjoy the 1000m rip. TIGER CODY has improved in blinkers. He is back to shorter and looks the biggest threat. ARKADIN has made steady improvement but is dropping in trip. AFRICAN RUBY has not been far back starting at long odds. He can do better here. First-timers AKIHITO, HOT BLOODED and BULLET CATCH have speedy pedigrees and need to be watched.

races.race_name: BET WITH COLOSSUS POOLS EXCLUSIVE ON www.tote.co.za MAIDEN PLATE
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: CHARLIE BUCKET has consistent Cape form over the distance. He was the favourite last two outings and with a 1.5kg allowance he could make amends. DEONARIE has shown up well in both starts. Steps up in trip but has the best draw. REDOUBT EXPRESS drifted in the market when making a smart debut on the poly. The turf should not be an issue and he rates a winning chance. IMPERIAL VALOR has the widest draw to contend with but improved with a tongue-tie and has a claiming apprentice up.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: PEEPING TOM has been knocking on the door for some time now. He stays the trip and rates the one to beat in this kind of contest. APACHE AG has run well at this venue and could suddenly pop up after meeting winners last time. AUGRABIES was a beaten favourite last run. His best recent form has been on the poly but he is in modest company. BOURBON’S BEAST tends to lack a finish but is never too far back. He should go well in this company. ACTION THRILLER and CAPTIVE PRINCE are lightly raced but have shown some potential.

races.race_name: TOTE FOR THE WIN B STAKES
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: SALANI KAHLE confirmed the promise he has shown with a well-earned runner-up position in the Grade 2 TAB SA Derby. He carries a big weight but could get the job done. UZWA- NO steps up in trip but is in good form over shorter. He should see it out and may go close. SAXON DYNASTY’s last run from near the front is best ignored. He can get the timing right. HODGE- PODGE is a smart filly who stays well. She has a handy galloping weight and should be right there again. QUEUE WING seldom runs a bad race. He is up in distance but has a light weight.

races.race_name: IN THE BOX SEAT PODCAST BROUGHT TO YOU BY GALLOP TV C STAKES
races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: TUNGUSKA comes off some smart recent Western Cape form. The stable has hardly missed since arriving in KwaZulu-Natal. GIMME THE TRUTH ran out an easy winner now matured. He has more to come. BLIZZARDBOY has shown up well in two starts on the poly since arriving in KZN. He shed his maiden on the turf and should run well in this. RED CARDINAL is down in class. If he stays the trip he will be a big contender. HIGH QUEUE is always consistent and with some luck in running he is in with a chance.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: RED CORAL is a filly taking on males but she has useful form. She was a beaten favourite last run on the poly and can make amends back on turf. Juvenile LET IT ROLL is a recent maiden winner and takes on older runners. However, he has improved with each outing and has a handy galloping weight. DANCING ON A CLOUD was much improved last time after switching yards. He has always shown promise and can follow up. RAGNAR THE KING is hard to follow but can upset. SLYTHERIN races fresh and along with RADU and TWILIGHT WARRIOR add to a tough contest.

races.tab_bet_types: WIN - PLACE - SWINGER - EXACTA - TRIFECTA - QUARTET
races.preview: PREACHER MAN showed up with a fair effort on local debut. The juvenile filly has a plum gate and can only improve. DIAMOND MAKER won at long odds last start in first-time blinkers back over a sprint. He could follow up on handicap debut. YANNAKIS has won his last two over course and distance and his 4kg claimer retains the ride. He must have a say even if racing after a rest. MASTER SILVANO looks to be back in the hunt now sprinting again. He has drawn wide here. PRINCESS GOLDIE is back on turf. Her poly form is consistent but she can do better here.
